title: AI Agent Data Retention / Audit Log Cost Calculator
description: Estimate monthly cost to store, archive, query, and export AI agent audit logs, conversation history, PII/PHI logs, and compliance telemetry.

scenarios.name: SaaS / Default
scenarios.description: A typical AI agent SaaS keeping 12 months of audit logs and conversations with SOC 2 readiness.

scenarios.name: Startup / MVP
scenarios.description: Lean retention: 6 months of logs, minimal compliance, rare exports.

scenarios.name: Enterprise / SOC 2
scenarios.description: 3-year retention with tiered storage and structured exports for enterprise customers.

scenarios.name: Regulated / HIPAA / Finance
scenarios.description: 7-year retention, high PII/PHI rate, encrypted archives, and strict audit controls.

faq.question: What does this calculator estimate?
faq.answer: Monthly and projected cost for AI agent audit logging and data retention: log ingestion, hot/warm/archive storage, queries, exports, backups, PII scanning, and engineering/compliance labor.

faq.question: Which retention rules does it cover?
faq.answer: It includes preset profiles for GDPR, SOC 2, HIPAA, and CCPA-style retention ranges from 6 months up to 7 years. You can override every month and cost assumption.

faq.question: How are conversation histories costed separately from audit events?
faq.answer: Audit events are small structured telemetry records. Conversation histories include prompts, outputs, and tool results. The calculator applies the conversation retention rate to monthly requests and a separate per-conversation size estimate.

faq.question: What counts as hot, warm, and archive storage?
faq.answer: Hot storage is live and frequently queried. Warm storage is searched occasionally at a higher per-query cost. Archive is cold long-term retention, cheap to store but expensive to query or restore.

faq.question: Does the tool include backups?
faq.answer: Yes. It adds a backup copy stored at object-storage rates for the selected backup retention period.
